release_summary: Replaces v2.1.12 fpts_fade band-aid with an architectural rank-quality gate that auto-scales across rounds via sigmaForADP. New candidate_quality_mult dampens 13 position-driven signal sites (capture, budget_boost, pos_need, momentum, dropoff, depth, scarcity, tier, stack-completion, bracket boosts, bring-back, CLV value) by exp(-rankGapSigma / decay_sigmas) when a candidate's effectiveRank is meaningfully worse than the current pick. The FPTS rank — which already incorporates ADP + projections + 5 manual levers — becomes the trusted truth signal; recommender's add-on signals defer to it. Empirically sweep-fit across 3 cluster anchors (BBM7, Dachshund, MiniGolden × 18 paired observations × 5 decay values × 3 floor values = 270+ jobs per contest): decay=2.5 ships across all 9 contests. v2.1.12 fpts_fade knobs reset to 0 everywhere (superseded). Hunter at pick 137 drops from #1 to #6; v2.1.x sanity preserved: Herbert R7 P81 ✓, Meyers R8 P85 ✓, White R10 P118 ✓, DeVonta R3 P33 ✓. Behavioral correction: R5 Tate → Lamar Jackson (rank 51 wins over rank 61) — direct consequence of 'rank matters more than ADP' principle, same as Hunter rejection.
